---
title: "ARI"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(here)
library(patchwork)

analysis_dir <- here("analysis")

source(file.path(analysis_dir, "knitr.R"))
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "theme.R"))
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "data.R"))
```

# ARI vs number of clusters

```{r ari-leiden-vs-clusters-group-paths, fig.height=5, fig.width=9}
ari_leiden_paths <- metrics_new %>%
  filter(filtering == "manual") %>%
  mutate(
    group_path = paste(dataset, method, n_comp, n_neig, n_hvg, sep = "-")
  ) %>%
  arrange(dataset, method, group_path, n_clusters_leiden)

p_ari_leiden_paths <- ggplot(
  ari_leiden_paths,
  aes(
    x = n_clusters_leiden, y = agree_ari_leiden,
    group = group_path, color = method
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~dataset, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  labs(
    x = "Number of clusters - Leiden", y = "ARI - Leiden",
    color = "Method"
  )

p_ari_leiden_paths
```

# ARI v Timings

```{r leiden-ari-vs-total-timing, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=8}
timing_cols_keep <- paste0("timings_", c(
  "find_mit_gene", "filter", "normalization",
  "hvg", "scaling", "pca", "leiden"
))

ari_vs_total_timing <- metrics_new %>%
  filter(filtering == "manual") %>%
  mutate(total_seconds = rowSums(pick(all_of(timing_cols_keep)), na.rm = TRUE))

ari_vs_total_timing_top <- ari_vs_total_timing %>%
  group_by(dataset, method) %>%
  mutate(ari_p95 = quantile(agree_ari_leiden, probs = 0.95)) %>%
  filter(agree_ari_leiden >= ari_p95) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-ari_p95)

set.seed(42)
s <- sample(nrow(ari_vs_total_timing_top))

p_ari_vs_total_timing <- ggplot(
  ari_vs_total_timing_top[s, ],
  aes(x = total_seconds, y = agree_ari_leiden, color = method)
) +
  geom_point(
    data = ari_vs_total_timing,
    alpha = 0.8, size = 1.4, colour = "grey90"
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.6) +
  facet_wrap(~dataset, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = "Total timing <i>(s)</i>", y = "Leiden ARI", color = "Method")

p_ari_vs_total_timing
```

# Compare with Iliana

```{r compare-iliana}
iliana_long <- iliana %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(agree_ari_leiden, agree_ari_louvain),
    names_to = "best_for", values_to = "iliana_ari"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    best_for = recode(
      best_for,
      agree_ari_leiden = "leiden", agree_ari_louvain = "louvain"
    )
  )

p_ari <- metrics_new %>%
  group_by(dataset, method) %>%
  summarize(
    leiden = quantile(agree_ari_leiden, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    louvain = quantile(agree_ari_louvain, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(leiden, louvain),
    names_to = "best_for", values_to = "our_ari"
  ) %>%
  arrange(method, dataset, best_for)

compare_ari <- p_ari %>%
  left_join(iliana_long, by = c("dataset", "method", "best_for")) %>%
  mutate(
    method = factor(method, levels = names(met_cols)),
    best_for = factor(as.character(best_for), levels = c("leiden", "louvain")),
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = names(dataset_cols))
  ) %>%
  arrange(method, dataset, best_for)

compare_ari
```

```{r plot-iliana, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=5}
ari_limits_p95 <- range(
  c(compare_ari$iliana_ari, compare_ari$our_ari_p95),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

p_iliana <- ggplot(compare_ari, aes(
  x = iliana_ari, y = our_ari,
  color = method, size = best_for, shape = dataset
)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "<i>Billato et al.</i> ARI", y = "Our 95<sup>th</sup> %tile ARI",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  coord_equal(xlim = ari_limits_p95, ylim = ari_limits_p95) +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "Dataset") +
  scale_size_manual(name = "Algorithm", values = c(leiden = 2.5, louvain = 1.5))

p_iliana
```

# Patchwork

```{r fig-ari, fig.height=7.6, fig.width=6.69}
layout_main <- "
AA
BB
CD
"

p_main_panels <- (
  (p_ari_leiden_paths + guides(color = "none")) +
    (p_ari_vs_total_timing + guides(color = "none")) +
    p_iliana +
    guide_area()
) +
  plot_layout(
    design = layout_main,
    heights = c(1.25, 1.25, 1.0),
    guides = "collect"
  ) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "left",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.direction = "vertical"
  )

p_main_panels
```
